# Vendored Dependencies

## TradingView Lightweight Charts v4.2.0

**File:** `lightweight-charts.standalone.production.js`
**Source:** https://github.com/tradingview/lightweight-charts
**License:** Apache License 2.0
**Copyright:** Copyright (c) 2024 TradingView, Inc.

The standalone production bundle is pinned at v4.2.0 and served locally
to avoid any CDN dependency at runtime.

### Attribution Requirement

Per TradingView documentation, charts built with this library must display:

> Powered by TradingView

This text is rendered inside each thesis chart. The standalone `thesis_chart.html`
renders it as a hyperlink per TradingView guidelines.
